narratives.Overview: Build the marky documentation site using Astro Starlight. Covers getting started, CLI reference, plugin authoring guide, API reference (TypeDoc), and the markdownlint migration guide. Can begin after auto-fix stabilises the core API.

items.title: New `docs/` Astro Starlight site scaffolded with marky branding
Getting Started page: install, 60-second usage, marky.config.ts example
CLI reference: all commands, flags, and exit codes documented
Plugin authoring guide: how to write a unified-lint-rule and register it in marky.config.ts
API reference: TypeDoc output integrated into Starlight for @marky/core public API
markdownlint migration guide: maps common .markdownlintrc rules to marky equivalents
Architecture overview page with the mdast pipeline diagram
`task docs:dev` and `task docs:build` targets added to root Taskfile.yml
Deployed to fly.io or GitHub Pages via CI on push to main
